title: westoniella barqueroana
intro: Westoniella barqueroana, also known as the "Mountain Mint" or "Wild Mountain Mint", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Westoniella barqueroana are primarily attributed to its high menthol content, which is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of consuming or applying Westoniella barqueroana include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to aid in reducing fever and promoting respiratory health. Westoniella barqueroana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
